title: Peoples reactions to Nge foreshadowing Eoe deaths
display_title: Peoples reactions to Nge foreshadowing Eoe deaths
wikitext:
[]: Peoples reactions to Nge foreshadowing Eoe deaths             Quote Post by ReiIsTopTierWaifu » Sat Mar 10, 2018 11:44 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Peoples reactions to Nge foreshadowing Eoe deaths             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 11, 2018 3:31 am From context it seemed obvious that what played out was Gendo: You know that thing we've spent all this time trying to prevent. Well, I'm off to start my own version of it. Misato & Ritsuko: Over our dead bodies. Gendou: Always happy to oblige a lady. ... Rei, it is time.

[]: Re: Peoples reactions to Nge foreshadowing Eoe deaths             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Mar 12, 2018 8:27 am ReiIsTopTierWaifu wrote: So you know how in NGE, in either episode 25 or 26 there was the shot of Misato and Ritsuko deaths, Misato collpased by the elevator, and Ritsukos body floating in the water with a blood stained lab coat, what do you think peoples reactions were to seeing their deaths and wondering how the hell they died, and having to wait an exact year after the final episode to see their deaths, also it kind of sucks that the show spoils itself since you already know that they're going to die in the movie, do you think people were annyoed seeing that, as well as the scrapped episode 25 and 26 preview episodes, and having to wait till Eoe to see the actual finished animations and context to them

[]: Re: Peoples reactions to Nge foreshadowing Eoe deaths             Quote Post by ReiIsTopTierWaifu » Mon Mar 12, 2018 8:46 am Blockio wrote: I have just watched the entirety of NGE with a friend of mine who has never seen it the other day, and he didnt even realise that the scenes were spoilers for EoE until seconds before they happened. Granted, it was 4am and we have been bingewatching for the last 11 hours, but the point still stands.
